lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, what is it that ye be wantin? I can tell ye all about the prices of runes, or perhaps I could combine the charges on yer teleport jewellery.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a pirate doing here?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: By my sea-blistered skin, I could ask the same of you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... I'm not a pirate?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: No? Then what's that smell? The smell o' someone spent too long at sea without a bath!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think that's probably you.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Har har har! We've got a stern landlubber 'ere! Well, let me tell ye, I'm here for the Grand Exchange! Gonna cash in me loot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you just want to sell it in a shop or trade it to someone specific?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: By my wave-battered bones! Not when I can sell to the whole world from this very spot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You pirates are nothing but trouble! Why, once I travelled to Lunar Isle with a bunch of your type, and spent days sailing around in circles!

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Then ye must know me brother! Murky Pat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm. Not so sure I remember him.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Well, 'e be on that ship for sure. And I remember 'im tellin' me about some [guy/gal] like ye, getting all mixed up with curses and cabin boys.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! That was me!

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Ye sure be a different character.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the prices of runes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Combine the charges on my teleport jewellery, please.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, ye've got nothing that I can combine.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, ye've nothing I can combine. Maybe ye needs to take yer stuff up to the Wilderness and charge it on the Fountain of Rune. It be more powerful than me.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, I think ye be a bit short of inventory space.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arr, all done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you deal in rings of forging?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrrr, bring me yer ruby rings to enchant.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrrr, but they arrre 250gp per ring.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, 250gp per ring. How many would ye like me to enchant?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, be seeing ya.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, pleasure doin' business with ya.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I got to go, erm, swab some decks! Yarr!

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Defer your speech right there! Quit this derogatory and somewhat narrow-minded allusion that all folks of sea voyage are only concerned with washing the decks, looking after parrots and drinking rum. I'll have ye

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: know there is much more to a pirate than meets the eye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aye-aye, captain!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, come on! Lighten up!

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Arrr, what is it that ye be wantin? I can tell ye all about the prices of runes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a pirate doing here?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: By my sea-blistered skin, I could ask the same of you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... I'm not a pirate?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: No? Then what's that smell? The smell o' someone spent too long at sea without a bath!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think that's probably you.

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: Har har har! We've got a stern landlubber 'ere! Well, let me tell ye, I'm here for the Grand Exchange! Gonna cash in me loot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you just want to sell it in a shop or trade it to someone specific?

lines.speaker: Murky Matt (runes)
lines.text: By my wave-battered bones! Not when I can sell to the whole world from this very spot!
